description_long: This object resembles a fantastical crustacean with exaggerated anatomical features, including a segmented, ribbed exoskeleton in a pale pink hue. The body is elongated and undulates, with prominent, wing-like appendages extending from each segment, giving it a dramatic, almost dragon-like appearance. The head is distinct, featuring a large, rounded white structure with a single, bulging red eye and a set of pronounced, jagged mandibles. There is a patch of brown, feathery texture behind the head, possibly mimicking setae or bristles. The underside reveals a series of spiny projections along the body, enhancing its menacing look. The overall form is both organic and stylized, with a blend of crustacean and mythical creature elements.
description: A stylized, segmented crustacean with wing-like appendages, a large white head with a red eye, and jagged mandibles. Its body is pale pink with spiny and feathery details.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the ribbed, wing-like appendages and the spiny projections along the body, with the head and mandibles clearly visible.
description_view_1: The rear-left view emphasizes the layered, overlapping segments and the feathery patch behind the head, with the mandibles partially obscured.
description_view_2: The right side view showcases the full length of the body, the prominent red eye, and the open mandibles, with the wing-like appendages fanned out.
description_view_3: The front-right view focuses on the head, displaying the red eye, open mandibles, and the feathery patch, while the body curves away from the viewer.
